statement.markdown: Write an efficient algorithm to find all subarrays with a sum of zero in a given array of integers. For example, in the array [4, -3, -1, -2, 5, -3, 4], the subarrays with a sum of zero are [-2, 5, -3], [-3, 4], and [-1, 3].
statement.outputFormat: A list of subarrays with a sum of zero
statement.notes: The algorithm should handle arrays with both positive and negative numbers and should be efficient enough to handle large arrays.

hints.text: Use a prefix sum array to efficiently calculate the sum of each subarray

editorial.title: Efficient Subarray Sum Finder
editorial.intuition: The idea is to use a prefix sum array to efficiently calculate the sum of each subarray.
editorial.bruteForce: Brute force approach: O(n^3) time complexity
editorial.betterSolution: Using a prefix sum array: O(n^2) time complexity
editorial.optimalSolution: Optimal solution using a prefix sum array and a hashmap: O(n^2) time complexity
commonMistakes: Incorrectly calculating the sum of each subarray
